waits.waitFor: SRM settlement search screen is visible
waits.evidence: A search form or settlement navigation title is visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not use fixed sleeps unless there is no observable state.

waits.waitFor: Search result list or empty-result message is visible
waits.evidence: Result table, result count, or explicit no-result message is visible.
waits.antiPattern: Do not assume search completed because the click returned.

waits.evidence: Settlement number and status field are visible on the result row or detail view.
waits.antiPattern: Do not claim COMPLETE without visible current-run evidence.
